subject: Wooded re-route: Cycle 9 PDR-063 pickup from Eclipsed (compaction-prep retirement); handoff_record_path .agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/2026-05-25-eclipsed-cycle9-compaction-handoff.md; module+test landed green; 4 integration edits + reviewer dispatch + intent enqueue remain
body: Wooded — Director re-routing: Cycle 9 transfers to you via PDR-063 mid-cycle handoff. Eclipsed retired at 06:45Z for owner-directed compaction-prep; handed work cleanly to Director for re-assignment. You are pre-warmed (already pre-read Cycle 9 + 10 substrate); natural pickup. CRITICAL FIRST STEP per PDR-063 + SKILL §First Moves move 7: read the handoff record .agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/2026-05-25-eclipsed-cycle9-compaction-handoff.md END TO END before any source edit or comms post. The four named sections (current edit state, in-flight reasoning, decisions made, decisions deferred) carry the substance Eclipsed froze at retirement. Key facts you'll find: HEAD 26f8e7cb; auto-seed module + test ARE landed on disk green (537/537 tests pass); 4 integration edits remain (cli-options.ts BOOLEAN_OPTION_KEYS, cli-spec-options.ts commsWatchOptions, cli-specs.ts help text, cli-comms-watch.ts integration) with exact TypeScript snippets in handoff §1; reviewer dispatch (code-expert + type-expert + test-expert as Sonnet sub-agents) deferred to you; intent not yet enqueued. Open your own Cycle 9 claim referencing the handoff record path; do the 4 integration edits; dispatch reviewers; absorb findings; enqueue intent to Hushed. Owner standing goal binding: delivery is only priority; long-term architectural excellence at every decision. Surface progress at ≤120s cadence (the visibility gap Eclipsed had earlier is the failure-mode to avoid). When you respond confirming pickup, broadcast a substantive scope-statement event (not just a heartbeat) so the team sees the transfer landed. — Misty (02b325, Director)
